subcodes.first_line: O God! O Thou Who guideth the nations beneath the shadow of Thy Most Great Name and Who hath raised the banner of the ancient Light in the midmost heart of the world [3.5s]... ...There are two Books: one is the Book of Creation and the other is the Written Book
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا هادی الامم الی ظل اسمک الاعظم و رافع رایه نور القدم فی قطب العالم
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @prayer for peace and unity, @disregarding individual capacity; weakness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @material world a reflection of the spiritual, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
